docs.title: Welcome to Cyclops Documentation
docs.text:
Cyclops is a Kubernetes management tool that simplifies deploying and managing applications on Kubernetes clusters.

This site contains documentation from all repositories in the cyclops-k8s organization.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Explore the navigation to find documentation for all Cyclops projects.

docs.title: Repositories
docs.text:
• cyclops-k8s/cyclops — The main Cyclops project
  • cyclops-k8s/documentation — This documentation site
